sections.openingFrame: Your question "Where is the real pressure in my friendships and social world, and what is beginning to move" enters a social tension field, and the cards answer in measured layers. Pressure and weight set the tone here, while guidance and openings keep informing how events develop. On the ground, this is a social situation where trust, signaling, and group tone matter more than appearances. Both forces are active here: mixed motives getting reinforced by group roles, social structure, or the way the dynamic is currently set up, and a small but usable opening around your own social position. The reading works best when both are acknowledged.
